experience.description: Teaching Expertise: Conducting classes and tutorials on Marketing Management and Organisational Behaviour. Designing and delivering engaging course materials, outlines, and presentations for effective student comprehension. Assessment and Evaluation: Preparing question papers, quizzes and assignments for continuous evaluation processes and End Semester examination, gauging student progress.

Teaching Expertise: Conducted classes and tutorials on marketing and analytics, specializing in Power Bi, advanced Excel, and SQL. Designed and delivered engaging course materials, outlines, and presentations for effective student comprehension. Curriculum Development: Contributed to research and development initiatives, enhancing the course content in Management & Liberal Arts. Led the design and development of the Program architecture for PGDM- Business Analytics, ensuring a comprehensive curriculum. Research Contributions: Developed research-based content for the GBS Blog, showcasing expertise and insights in the field. Interactive Teaching Methods: Designed, developed, and delivered dynamic classes on newsroom activities and Group Discussions (GDs), fostering an interactive learning environment. Assessment and Evaluation: Prepared quizzes and assignments for continuous evaluation processes, gauging student progress. Crafted end-semester examination question papers and actively participated in the evaluation of answerscripts. Actively participated in invigilating End-Semester examinations and contributed to continuous evaluation processes.

Organizing various university events, seminars and workshops. Conducting various student training Programs. Comprehensive event coordination encompassing budget oversight and the management of suppliers and vendors. Oversee the activities of different student Clubs and handling student grievances. Overseeing the complete admission procedure from initiation to conclusion.

Counselling students for regarding the admission procedure. Taking responsibilities of batches as batch coordinators. Maintaining batch specific files. Organising and coordinating National Level Scholarship exams. Providing support and guidance to students experiencing academic and personal issues. Providing recurring academic advisement services to ensure continuous educational advancement for students.
